top_signals.title: Russian Oil Exports Hit 2026 High as Iran Waiver Threatens Sales
top_signals.summary: Tumbling oil prices after the interim US-Iran peace deal are eating into Moscow’s windfall
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UAE's exit from OPEC+ reduced the group's share of crude oil production and capacity
top_signals.summary: On April 28, 2026, the United Arab Emirates (UAE) announced that it was leaving OPEC, effective on May 1. OPEC was formed in 1960 by Iraq, Iran, Kuwait, Saudi Arabia, and Venezuela, with the stated objective to "coordinate and unify petroleum policies among Member Countries." OPEC is best known for its effect on global crude oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Platinum Is Said Sole Remaining Bidder for Nestle Water Unit
top_signals.summary: Platinum Equity is the last remaining bidder for Nestle SA’s water business after rival Clayton Dubilier & Rice dropped out of the race, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Stada Weighs €6 Billion Takeover of CVC-Backed Cooper Consumer Health
top_signals.summary: Stada is exploring a potential purchase of Cooper Consumer Health from its private equity owners, people familiar with the matter said, as it hunts for acquisitions on the back of record profits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
